paper_title: Phylogenetic and Expression Analysis of PSK Genes in Rosaceae

methods.description: This method examines the evolutionary relationships of PSK genes between pear and other Rosaceae species by constructing a neighbor-joining phylogenetic tree using full-length protein sequences.

steps.description: Constructed a neighbor-joining phylogenetic tree in MAGA 7.0 using the full-length protein sequences of 10 PbrPSKs from pear, 11 MdPSKs from apple, four PpPSKs from peach, six FvPSKs from strawberry and five PmPSKs from Chinese plum.
steps.searchable_summary: construct phylogenetic tree using MAGA 7.0 with PSK protein sequences
inputs: full-length protein sequences of PSK genes from pear, apple, peach, strawberry, and Chinese plum

methods.description: This method investigates the protein structures of PSK in five Rosaceae species by constructing conserved motifs using the MEME website.

steps.description: 10 conserved motifs were constructed using the MEME website.

methods.method_name: Gene Structure Analysis of PSK Genes
methods.description: This method establishes the introns and exons of PSK genes using GSDS 2.0 to analyze gene structures.

steps.description: The introns and exons of PSK genes were established using GSDS 2.0.

methods.method_name: Evolutionary Pattern Analysis of PSK Genes
methods.description: This method analyzes the different duplication modes of PSK genes using the MCScanX package to explain the origin of the PSK gene family expansion.

steps.description: The MCScanX package was used to analyze the different duplication modes of the PSK genes.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze gene duplication modes using MCScanX

methods.description: This method performs synteny analyses among pear and other Rosaceae species to identify orthologous genes and collinear gene pairs.

steps.description: Synteny analyses were performed among pear and the other four Rosaceae species.
steps.searchable_summary: perform synteny analysis to identify orthologous genes
inputs: PSK gene sequences from pear and other Rosaceae species

methods.method_name: Expression Profile Analysis of PSK Genes
methods.description: This method studies the tissue-specific expression pattern of PbrPSK genes in pear using transcriptome data and RT-PCR.

steps.description: The expression levels of PSK genes in different tissues were determined using transcriptome data (RPKM values) and RT-PCR.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze tissue-specific expression using transcriptome data and RT-PCR
